# Implementation Report: Type Migration - Address/Hex to viem, Handle redefinition, normalizeHandle removal

Generated: 2026-03-06

## Task

Switch all Address/Hex imports from `@zama-fhe/relayer-sdk` to `viem`, redefine Handle locally as `0x${string}`, and remove normalizeHandle.

## Changes Made

### Task 1: Switch Address/Hex imports to viem

1. **`src/relayer/relayer-sdk.types.ts`** - Changed `import type { Address, Hex }` from `@zama-fhe/relayer-sdk/bundle` to `viem`. Added explicit `export type { Address, Hex } from "viem"` and removed them from the relayer-sdk/bundle re-export block.

2. **`src/token/token.types.ts`** - Changed `import type { Address, Hex }` and `export type { Address }` / `export type { Hex }` to source from `viem` instead of `../relayer/relayer-sdk.types`. Kept Handle re-export from relayer-sdk.types.

### Task 2: Redefine Handle locally

3. **`src/relayer/relayer-sdk.types.ts`** - Changed `export type Handle = SDK.Bytes32Hex` to `export type Handle = \`0x\${string}\``.

### Task 3: Remove normalizeHandle

4. **`src/utils.ts`** - Removed `normalizeHandle` function and unused imports (`hexToBigInt`, `isHex`, `toHex` from viem, `Handle` type).

5. **`src/query/utils.ts`** - Removed `export { normalizeHandle } from "../utils"`.

6. **`src/query/index.ts`** - Removed `normalizeHandle` from the export list.

7. **`src/query/confidential-handle.ts`** - Removed `normalizeHandle` import; changed `return normalizeHandle(handle)` to `return handle as Handle`.

8. **`src/query/confidential-handles.ts`** - Same pattern as above.

9. **`src/query/confidential-balance.ts`** - Removed `normalizeHandle` import; simplified `EncryptedBalanceHandle` from `Handle | bigint` to `Handle`; changed `normalizeHandle(config.handle)` to `config?.handle`.

10. **`src/query/confidential-balances.ts`** - Removed `normalizeHandle` import; changed `config?.handles?.map((handle) => normalizeHandle(handle))` to `config?.handles`.

11. **`src/token/readonly-token.ts`** - Removed `normalizeHandle` import; changed `return normalizeHandle(await this.signer.readContract(...))` to `return await this.signer.readContract(...) as Handle`.

12. **`src/relayer/cleartext/cleartext-fhevm-instance.ts`** - Removed `normalizeHandle` import; replaced 3 calls: `params.handles.map(normalizeHandle)` to `params.handles`, and `handles.map(normalizeHandle)` to just `handles`.

## Test Results

- `packages/sdk`: 0 non-test type errors
- `packages/react-sdk`: 0 non-test type errors
- Test files have pre-existing type errors (unrelated `string[]` vs `0x${string}[]` in activity.test.ts)

## Notes

- The react-sdk re-exports Address/Hex from `@zama-fhe/sdk` which now sources from viem -- no changes needed there.
- All remaining `import ... from "../relayer/relayer-sdk.types"` for Address/Hex in non-token-types files still work because relayer-sdk.types re-exports them from viem.
